error_signature: cannot select a flow inside the same Workflow
title: Unable to select sub-workflow in Call n8n Workflow node
symptom: When using the Call n8n Workflow Tool, users cannot select a flow that is part of the same workflow, leading to confusion about feature availability.
not_this_if: Target workflow is saved separately and referenced correctly
root_cause: In recent versions of n8n, the Call n8n Workflow node requires the target workflow to be saved as a separate entity. This change means that nested workflows cannot be called directly within the same editing context, which may have been possible in earlier versions.
fix_steps: Save the sub-workflow as a separate workflow
Reference the saved workflow by name or ID in the Call n8n Workflow Tool
agent_instruction: Save the sub-workflow separately and reference it in the Call n8n Workflow Tool.
